creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Upgrade to 2.45;

        - Don't disable the game engine

        - s/post-patch/configure/ to ease patches modifications;

        - s/mv/cp -p/ to allow `make reinstall'.

        Changelog from
        <http://www.blender.org/development/release-logs/blender-245/>

Fix: Please consider the following patch:
How-To-Repeat: 	Have a son hacking with blender ;-)
